name: Gratin of Potatoes and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and split the garlic cloves.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes paper-thin. Slice just before using to prevent darkening; do not soak in cold water.
3. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 C).
4. Rub the bottom and sides of a gratin dish with the cut sides of the garlic, leaving the garlic in the dish.
5. Cover with a layer of potatoes.
6. Sprinkle with salt and freshly ground pepper, then sprinkle with cheese.
7. Pour some cream over the top.
8. Repeat layers until all potatoes, cream, and cheese are used.
9. Place the pan uncovered in the oven (put a baking sheet underneath to catch spills).
10. Bake for 1 hour or more, until the top is browned and the cream has thickened.
11. During the first half hour of cooking, use a broad spatula to gently press the top layers of potatoes into the cream occasionally.
12. Serve hot, at room temperature, or cold.
